title: Regional anesthesia documentation prompts

treatment_and_management.text: Supports clinician documentation of a regional procedure, preoperative preparation, and day-surgery suitability.
treatment_and_management.rationale: The exact RCoA recommendations support documenting regional-anesthesia suitability, preparation, completed assessment, risk discussion, consent context, and the clinician-entered record without creating a block plan.
treatment_and_management.evidence_extract: Supports clinician documentation of a regional procedure, preoperative preparation, and day-surgery suitability.

source.title: Guidelines for the Provision of Regional Anaesthesia Services 2025

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 8.31, 8.35, and 8.37 — documentation, preparation, and suitability

treatment_and_management.text: Supports documented follow-up systems, mobilization status, discharge information, and postoperative education without directing management.
treatment_and_management.rationale: The exact follow-up section supports documenting an already arranged handover, follow-up, mobilization assessment, discharge process, or education; no discharge decision or instruction is generated.
treatment_and_management.evidence_extract: Supports documented follow-up systems, mobilization status, discharge information, and postoperative education without directing management.

source.title: Guidelines for the Provision of Regional Anaesthesia Services 2025

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 8.41–8.43 — follow-up, mobilization, discharge, and education

source_limitations: Procedure, indication, side and site, technique, consent, equipment, asepsis, monitoring, medicine, concentration, volume, dose, adjunct, aspiration, injection, ultrasound, block result, complications, intervention, recovery, mobilization, discharge, instructions, and follow-up remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
